name: Ministry of Education Religious Affairs and Sports
notes: Sets national education policy; supervises recognition bodies and private college licensing. Track annual circulars affecting transnational education and document requirements for foreign credentials.

name: DOATAP (Hellenic NARIC)
notes: Academic recognition for foreign higher-education degrees; determines equivalence of UNIC Nicosia degrees for postgraduate entry, public sector roles, and regulated professions.

name: SAEP (Council for the Recognition of Professional Qualifications)
notes: Implements EU Directive 2005/36/EC for professional rights; handles compensatory measures and recognition decisions for regulated professions (engineering, health, architecture, etc.).

name: Ministry of Migration and Asylum
notes: Sets immigration policy, including national D visas and residence permits; monitor timelines and regional migration office processing relevant to non-EU students headed to UNIC Athens.
